channel.title: Spotify on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Spotify on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Spotify Chatbot for Music
item.description:
Introduction to Spotify’s Chatbot  

Spotify, a renowned music streaming service, has recently introduced a chatbot feature for its Premium users. This innovation allows users to engage in conversations about music, podcasts, and books, further enriching their overall experience. The chatbot is designed to provide users with a more personalized and interactive way to explore their favorite content.

item.title: Spotify Introduces Talk Feature
item.description:
Introduction to Talk to Spotify  

Spotify has introduced a new beta feature called ‘Talk to Spotify’, which allows users to control the app with voice or text commands. This feature is available to Premium users 18 or older in the US, Ireland, and Sweden, and is rolling out gradually across iOS and Android devices in English. With Talk to Spotify, users can have a back-and-forth conversation to choose what’s playing, learn about the music they love, revisit their listening history, and go deeper on podcasts and audiobooks, all without leaving Spotify.

item.title: Spotify AI Chatbot Launched
item.description:
Introduction to Spotify’s AI Chatbot  

Spotify is experimenting with a new AI feature called “Talk to Spotify” that allows Premium subscribers to interact with a chatbot to play and explore music, audiobooks, and podcasts. This feature is available across the Home and Now Playing view on Spotify’s mobile app. The “Talk to Spotify” chatbox can be used to type requests, and a mic symbol is also available for voice input.

item.title: Spotify AI Music Assistant
item.description:
Introduction to Spotify’s AI Music Assistant  

Spotify has recently announced the expansion of its AI push with a ChatGPT-like music assistant. This new feature allows users to chat with Spotify across the app’s Home and Now Playing views on mobile devices. The assistant is designed to help users choose what to play next, explore their listening history, and discover new music.
